op.PERLICA.potential.1.event.description.text: Combo skill Instant Protocol: Chain improved: Electrification duration +{duration-1:0%}.

op.PERLICA.potential.2.event.description.text: Ultimate Protocol ε: 70.41K improved: Ultimate Energy cost -15%.

op.PERLICA.potential.3.event.description.text: After Perlica applies Electrification to the enemy, she gains ATK +20% for 5s. This effect can reach 2 stacks.

op.PERLICA.potential.4.event.description.text: Combo skill Instant Protocol: Chain improved: The Arts DMG Taken debuff effects on the enemy applied by the skill's Electrification are increased to 1.33 times the original.

op.PERLICA.potential.5.event.description.text: Ultimate Protocol ε: 70.41K improved: Critical Rate +30%.

op.PERLICA.skill.INSTANT_PROTOCOL_CHAIN..text: When controlled operator performs a Final Strike on any enemy. Unleashes stored electro-magnetic energy to bombard the target, dealing Electric DMG and forcibly inflicting temporary Electrification.

op.PERLICA.skill.PROTOCOL_ALPHA_BREACH_B.text: An attack with up to 4 sequences that deals Electric DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals {poise:0} Stagger.

op.PERLICA.skill.PROTOCOL_ALPHA_BREACH_D.text: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Electric DMG to nearby enemies.

op.PERLICA.skill.PROTOCOL_ALPHA_BREACH_F.text: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher that deals massive Electric DMG and recovers some SP.

op.PERLICA.skill.PROTOCOL_EPSILON.event..text: Tele-protocols a massive piece of orbital debris into the battlefield with devastating impact. All enemies in the area of effect suffer massive Electric DMG.

op.PERLICA.skill.PROTOCOL_OMEGA_STRIKE.e.text: Unleashes a bolt of electro-magnetic energy that deals Electric DMG and Electric Infliction to enemies in a small area.

op.PERLICA.status.PERLICA_POTENTIAL3_SUP.text: After Perlica applies Electrification, ATK +20% for 5s. Max 2 stacks.

op.PERLICA.talent.CYCLE_PROTOCOL_TALENT..text: Combo skill Instant Protocol: Chain improved: When hitting a Vulnerable enemy, the hit chains 1 more time.
